# Contributing (.github копия)

Актуально: **[CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)** в корне — [ts-response-service-example](https://github.com/advayta108/ts-response-service-example).

## Code of Conduct

[CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

## Workflow (кратко)

```bash
git clone https://github.com/advayta108/ts-response-service-example.git
cd ts-response-service-example
bun install
bun run dev
```

PR в `main`: https://github.com/advayta108/ts-response-service-example/pulls

```bash
git remote add upstream https://github.com/advayta108/ts-response-service-example.git
```
